entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop being bred for resistance to the sorghum midge to maintain grain yields.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the sorghum plant to resist attack by Contarinia sorghicola.

entities.name: CONTARINIA SORGHICOLA
entities.description: The sorghum midge, a pest that negatively impacts grain yields.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop in terms of grain output.

entities.name: SCREENING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to identify and evaluate stable sources of resistance in plants.

entities.name: BREEDING FOR RESISTANCE
entities.description: The process of developing plant varieties that exhibit host plant resistance.

entities.name: INHERITANCE OF RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic mechanisms and patterns by which resistance traits are passed to offspring.
